Description:
Columbia PowerFill 3.5 Pro Series Cordless Loading Pump

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button. Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill. * Bucket not included. Features SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level. One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries. Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning. Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips. Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes. Powerstroke Pump 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability. Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling. Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter. ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning. Powered by DEWALT® Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use. Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers. Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable. Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes.

Features

  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Platinum Angle Head Corner Finisher with Wheels provides a professional-grade solution for achieving crisp, uniform internal corners in a single pass. Engineered with a robust, high-quality cast-aluminum body, this tool is designed to withstand the rigors of daily job site use while maintaining consistent pressure for a clean, professional finish. Whether you are operating behind a corner roller or skimming with a corner box, the integrated wheel system ensures smooth tracking and precise compound application, significantly reducing the need for manual sanding and touch-up work.

Features:

  • Precision Cast-Aluminum Construction: Built for durability and long-term performance in demanding drywall finishing environments.
  • Integrated Wheel System: Facilitates smooth, consistent movement along internal corners for a flawless, professional-grade finish.
  • Single-Pass Efficiency: Evenly finishes both sides of an inside corner simultaneously, saving time and labor on every project.
  • Versatile Compatibility: Designed to work seamlessly with standard corner rollers and corner boxes for a streamlined finishing workflow.
  • Paint-Ready Results: Delivers a sharp, clean corner that requires minimal sanding before painting.

Name: Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper
Short description: The Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper accelerates the taping process by applying an even coat of compound directly to the tape as it is pulled. This efficient tool features adjustable flow control to ensure consistent results for both professional and DIY applications.
Description:
Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper streamlines the joint finishing process by combining tape application and mud coating into a single, efficient motion. Designed for both seasoned professionals and those new to drywall finishing, this tool significantly reduces labor time compared to manual taping methods. By integrating directly with a standard 5-gallon bucket of thinned joint compound, the unit ensures a consistent, controlled flow of mud onto the tape as it is pulled. An integrated adjustment wing nut allows for precise control over the mud application rate, ensuring professional-grade results on every seam.

Features:

  • Integrated Mud Application: Automatically coats one side of the tape as it is pulled from the bucket, eliminating the need for separate mudding steps.
  • Adjustable Flow Control: Features a precision wing nut that allows users to dial in the exact amount of compound applied to the tape.
  • High-Efficiency Design: Engineered to drastically reduce the time and physical effort required for traditional hand-taping tasks.
  • Universal Compatibility: Designed to work seamlessly with standard 5-gallon buckets commonly used on job sites.

Name: TapeTech Pro Performance Set
Short description: The TapeTech Pro Performance Set TTPPS is a complete 19-piece professional drywall finishing kit featuring dual pumps, XTender handles, and specialized nail spotters. This high-capacity set is engineered for maximum productivity in taping, flat finishing, and corner detailing.
Description:
TapeTech Pro Performance Set TTPPS provides a comprehensive solution for high-volume drywall finishing, expanding on standard kits with advanced components for fastener finishing and increased operational efficiency. This professional-grade collection includes dual loading pumps to minimize downtime and dual XTender flat box handles for improved reach and control during flat finishing tasks. Designed for contractors who require precision and speed, this set covers every stage of the drywall finishing process from initial taping to final corner and fastener detailing.

Features:

  • Comprehensive Tooling: Includes 19 essential components for taping, flat finishing, inside-corner finishing, and fastener finishing.
  • Enhanced Efficiency: Features two loading pumps and dual XTender flat box handles to streamline workflow and reduce manual effort.
  • Precision Finishing: Equipped with 10-inch and 12-inch EasyClean flat boxes, plus 2-inch and 3-inch nail spotters for consistent results.
  • Versatile Corner Work: Includes a corner roller, corner finisher adapter, and both 2.5-inch and 3-inch EasyRoll adjustable corner finishers.
  • Set Includes: 07TT Automatic Taper, EZ10TT and EZ12TT Flat Boxes, 15TTE Corner Roller, 42TT and 48TT Corner Finishers, CA08TT Corner Applicator, NS02TT and NS03TT Nail Spotters, two 76TT Loading Pumps, 85TT Gooseneck, 90TT Flat Box Filler, CFA-TT Adapter, three XHTT Extendable Handles, and two 88TTE XTender Handles.
Categories: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Tool Sets & Kits
Tags: Drywall Finishing Tools, TapeTech

Name: TapeTech Value Drywall Finishing Set
Short description: The TapeTech Value Drywall Finishing Set is a complete 10-piece kit designed for efficient finishing of flats, butt joints, and corners. This professional-grade package includes all necessary boxes, handles, and filling tools to support high-volume drywall projects.
Description:
TapeTech Value Drywall Finishing Set provides a comprehensive solution for contractors seeking to streamline the finishing of flats, butt joints, and corners. This kit bundles essential high-performance components into a single, cost-effective package, ensuring you have the necessary equipment to handle standard drywall finishing tasks with precision and efficiency. Built for durability and ease of maintenance, these tools are designed to withstand the rigors of daily job site use while delivering consistent, professional results.

Features

  • Comprehensive Finishing Kit: Includes 10-inch and 12-inch EasyClean flat boxes, a corner roller, and a 3-inch adjustable corner finisher for versatile application.
  • Complete Operational Support: Comes equipped with a loading pump, flat box filler, corner applicator, and the necessary handles and adapters to begin work immediately.
  • Durable Construction: Features an interchangeable fiberglass support handle and a 42-inch flat box handle for ergonomic control and extended reach.
  • Set Includes: 10 in. EasyClean Flat Box (EZ10TT), 12 in. EasyClean Flat Box (EZ12TT), Corner Roller (15TTE), 3 in. EasyRoll Adjustable Corner Finisher (48TT), 8 in. Corner Applicator (CA08TT), Loading Pump (76TT), Flat Box Filler (90TT), Corner Finisher Adapter (CFA-TT), Fiberglass Support Handle (FHTT), and 42 in. Flat Box Handle (8042TT).
  • Reliable Performance: Backed by a 5-year manufacturer warranty to ensure long-term operational value.
